1785290.name: Knights and Castles(1.0)
1785290.description:
"This is a support me if you can DLC"


THIS DLC IS NOT REQUIRED TO ENJOY THE FULL CONTENT OF KNC(Knights and Castles)

THIS DLC IS REQUIRED IF YOU WANT TO MAKE ME HAPPY AND SUPPORT MY GAMES =D!

The Toy Store has 3 colored playful shirts , each one of them gives you a initial boost to your stats.
Th Toy Store also sells you a nice "Skin" helm you can use in the game!
The Toy Store also sells you some Elixirs that will make your life much easyer =)

How much?

1. Goldfind + 10.

2. Expfind + 10.

3. Lootfind + 10.

Please support so I can keep making crazy games for you guys!!

Yeaaaaapppee xD
